member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Exceptions.EmptySurrealDbResponseException
member.summary: Generated exception when the response from the SurrealDb query is empty.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Exceptions.SurrealDbErrorResultException
member.summary: Generated exception when the response from the SurrealDb query is an unexpected error.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Exceptions.SurrealDbException
member.summary: Generated exception when the response from the SurrealDb query is an unexpected error.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbLoggingOptions.SensitiveDataLoggingEnabled
member.summary: Used to detect if application data should be included in logs. This typically include parameter values set for SURQL queries. You should only enable this flag if you have the appropriate security measures in place based on the sensitivity of this data.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Extensions.SemverExtensions.ToSemver(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a SurrealDB version string to a Semver version.
member.param: The SurrealDB version string extracted from .

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Handlers.QueryInterpolatedStringHandler
member.summary: A custom-tailored to interpret query strings passed down to .

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Internals.Helpers.RandomHelper.CreateRandomId
member.summary: Generates a random string with 8 characters

member.name: F:SurrealDb.Net.Internals.Logging.DbLoggerCategory.Name
member.summary: The prefix for all logger categories.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Internals.Logging.DbLoggerCategory.Connection
member.summary: Logger category for messages related to connection operations.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Internals.Logging.DbLoggerCategory.Method
member.summary: Logger category for method execution, excluding .

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Internals.Logging.DbLoggerCategory.Query
member.summary:
Logger category for messages related to written or generated queries, that can be executed within
or .

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Internals.ISurrealDbProviderEngine.Initialize(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions,System.Action{Dahomey.Cbor.CborOptions},SurrealDb.Net.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ISurrealDbLoggerFactory)
member.summary: Initializes engine dynamically, due to DependencyInjection interop.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Internals.SurrealDbWsEngine.InternalConnectAsync(System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Avoid multiple connections in a multi-threading context and prevent usage before initialized

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.DatabaseAuth
member.summary: Credentials for the database user

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.DatabaseAuth.Namespace
member.summary: The namespace the user has access to

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.DatabaseAuth.Database
member.summary: The database the user has access to

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.DatabaseAuth.Username
member.summary: The username of the namespace user

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.DatabaseAuth.Password
member.summary: The password of the namespace user

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.Jwt
member.summary:
A JSON Web Token for authenticating with the server.
This class represents a JSON Web Token (JWT) that can be used for authentication purposes.
However, you should take care to ensure that only authorized users have access to the JWT.
For example:
* it can be stored in a secure cookie,
* stored in a database with restricted access,
* or encrypted in conjunction with other encryption mechanisms.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.Jwt.Token
member.summary: The underlying token string

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.NamespaceAuth
member.summary: Credentials for the namespace user

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.NamespaceAuth.Namespace
member.summary: The namespace the user has access to

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.NamespaceAuth.Username
member.summary: The username of the namespace user

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.NamespaceAuth.Password
member.summary: The password of the namespace user

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.RootAuth
member.summary: Credentials for the root user

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.RootAuth.Username
member.summary: The username of the root user

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.RootAuth.Password
member.summary: The password of the root user

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.ScopeAuth
member.summary: Credentials for the scope user

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.ScopeAuth.Namespace
member.summary: The namespace the user has access to

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.ScopeAuth.Database
member.summary: The database the user has access to

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.ScopeAuth.Scope
member.summary: The scope to use for signin and signup

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.ScopeAuth.Access
member.summary: The access method to use for signin and signup

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration
member.summary:
Represents a SurrealDB duration.
Its sole purpose is to be more precise than and to be able to read the nanosecond part of the data type. In fact, maximum precision is . The of a is 1 which represent 100 nanoseconds. If a precision under 100 nanoseconds is required, then use .
Otherwise, you may simply want to use .

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a default , equivalent to "0ns".

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a from and parts.
member.param: The total number of seconds to store in this . Defaults to 0.
The total number of nanoseconds to store in this . Defaults to 0.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.ToTimeSpan
member.summary: Converts the to a unit.

member.name: F:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.Zero
member.summary: A Zero duration (equals to "0ns")

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.NanoSeconds
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.MicroSeconds
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.MilliSeconds
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.Seconds
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.Minutes
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.Hours
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.Days
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.Weeks
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Duration.Years
member.summary: The part of the type.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Future
member.summary: This represents the future type that we retrieve in certain responses from SurrealDB. It is used to represent a computational function.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.LiveQuery.SurrealDbLiveQuery`1.GetResults(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates asynchronously through the collection of results (all actions CREATE, UPDATE and DELETE, except OPEN and CLOSE).
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.exception: When the SurrealDB client has been disposed.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.LiveQuery.SurrealDbLiveQuery`1.GetCreatedRecords(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates asynchronously through the collection of created records.
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.exception: When the SurrealDB client has been disposed.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.LiveQuery.SurrealDbLiveQuery`1.GetUpdatedRecords(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates asynchronously through the collection of updated records.
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.exception: When the SurrealDB client has been disposed.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.LiveQuery.SurrealDbLiveQuery`1.GetDeletedRecords(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates asynchronously through the collection of deleted records.
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.exception: When the SurrealDB client has been disposed.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.LiveQuery.SurrealDbLiveQuery`1.KillAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Kills the underlying live query.
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: Whether the Live Query was successfully killed or not.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.None
member.summary: This represents the NONE type that we retrieve in certain responses from SurrealDB. It is used to represent the absence of a value.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range`2
member.summary: This represents a Range type that is composed of possible delimiters known as and .
member.typeparam: The value type of the left/start bound.
The value type of the right/end bound.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range`2.Start
member.summary: The left/start bound of the range.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range`2.End
member.summary: The right/end bound of the range.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range`2.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a full Range, that has no defined delimiters.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range`2.#ctor(System.Nullable{SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound{`0}},System.Nullable{SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound{`1}})
member.summary: Creates a new Range, given the start and end range.
member.param: The expected left/start bound.
The expected right/end bound.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range.Full
member.summary: Creates a full , having no start or end delimiter.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range.StartFrom``1(SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound{``0})
member.summary: Creates a partial , having a start bound limit but no end delimiter.
member.typeparam: The value type of the left/start bound.
member.param: The expected left/start bound.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range.EndTo``1(SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound{``0})
member.summary: Creates a partial , having an end bound limit but no start delimiter.
member.typeparam: The value type of the right/end bound.
member.param: The expected right/end bound.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Range.FromRange(System.Range)
member.summary: Creates a from a native type.
member.param: The native range to start from.
member.exception: Failed to convert because one index of the range is 'fromEnd'.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound`1
member.summary: A used exclusively for the type.
member.typeparam: The data type of the bound value.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound`1.Type
member.summary: The type of the bound.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound`1.Value
member.summary: The value of the bound.

member.summary: Creates a new RangeBound, given a value and the type of the bound.
member.param: The expected bound value.
The expected bound type.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound.Inclusive``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates an inclusive .
member.typeparam: The data type of the bound value.
member.param: The expected bound value.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBound.Exclusive``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates an exclusive .
member.typeparam: The data type of the bound value.
member.param: The expected bound value.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RangeBoundType
member.summary: The type of . It can be either inclusive or exclusive.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Record
member.summary: The base record type.

member.summary: The id of the record

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RecordId
member.summary: A non-generic base implementation for the type. Reflects a record ID (that contains both the record's table name and id).

member.summary: Table part of the record id.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RecordId.DeserializeId``1
member.summary: Deserialize the non-generic id part stored in the record id to the type .
member.typeparam: Expected type of the id part.

member.summary: Try to deserialize the non-generic id part stored in the record id to the type .
member.typeparam: Expected type of the id part.
member.param: The deserialized id part.

member.summary: Creates a new record ID from a generically typed table and a generically typed id.

member.param: Table name
Table id

Table id

member.summary: Reflects a record ID (that contains both the record's table name and id). Inherited implementation of that enforces the generic type of to be of type .

member.summary: This represents a RecordIdRange type that is composed of a table name and a .

member.exception: A table name should be provided.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RelationRecord
member.summary: The base relation record type.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RelationRecord.In
member.summary: The id of the record the relation starts from

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.RelationRecord.Out
member.summary: The id of the record the relation ends at

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse
member.summary: The response type of a query request.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.Oks
member.summary: Gets all OK results from the query response.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.Errors
member.summary: Gets all errors from the query response.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.FirstResult
member.summary: Gets the first result from the response, null otherwise.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.FirstOk
member.summary: Gets the first OK result from the response, null otherwise.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.FirstError
member.summary: Gets the first error from the response, null otherwise.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.HasErrors
member.summary: Checks if the response contains any errors.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.IsEmpty
member.summary: Checks if the response contains any result.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.IsSingle
member.summary: Checks if the response contains a single result.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.EnsureAllOks
member.summary: Throws an exception if at least one error is found in the list of .

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.GetValue``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the result value of the query based on its index.
member.typeparam: The type of the query result value.
member.param: The index of the result in the query response.
member.exception: The result is not an OK result.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbResponse.GetValues``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the result value of the query based on its index.
member.typeparam: The type of the query result value.
member.param: The index of the result in the query response.
member.exception: The result is not an OK result.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbErrorResult
member.summary: A SurrealDB error result that can be returned from a query request.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbErrorResult.Time
member.summary: Time taken to execute the query.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbErrorResult.Status
member.summary: Status of the query ("ERR").

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbErrorResult.Details
member.summary: Details about the error.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.ISurrealDbResult
member.summary: The base SurrealDB result interface, result of a query request.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.ISurrealDbErrorResult
member.summary: The base SurrealDB error result interface, result of a query request.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbOkResult
member.summary: A SurrealDB ok result that can be returned from a query request.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbOkResult.Time
member.summary: Time taken to execute the query.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbOkResult.Status
member.summary: Status of the query ("OK").

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbOkResult.GetValue``1
member.summary: Gets the result value of the query.
member.typeparam: The type of the query result value.
member.exception: T is not compatible with the query result value.
There is no compatible deserializer for T.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbOkResult.GetValues``1
member.summary: Enumerates the result value of the query.
member.typeparam: The type of the query result value.
member.exception: T is not compatible with the query result value.
There is no compatible deserializer for T.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbProtocolErrorResult
member.summary: A SurrealDB protocol error result that can be returned from a query request, either from a 400 or 500 error.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbProtocolErrorResult.Code
member.summary: The HTTP status code of the error.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbProtocolErrorResult.Details
member.summary: Details about the error.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbProtocolErrorResult.Description
member.summary: Description of the error.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbProtocolErrorResult.Information
member.summary: Some information about the error.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.Response.SurrealDbUnknownResult
member.summary: A SurrealDB unknown result that can be returned from a query request.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.Models.StringRecordId
member.summary: A placeholder type that reflects a Record ID stored a single string.
member.remarks: For performance reasons, the parsing of Record IDs is not implemented in the library, as that would require to parse any SurrealQL value in the provided . And for this reason, this type is only used for one-way communication, sending a from the client to a SurrealDB instance. This library will never be able to deserialize a into a . As such, please consider using or one of its inherited types for these scenarii.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.Models.StringRecordId.Value
member.summary: The value representing the Record ID as a single string, e.g. "person:john"

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.StringRecordId.#ctor
member.summary: Instanciate a new that will contain a Record ID representation as a single string.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.Models.StringRecordId.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Instanciate a new that will contain a Record ID representation as a single string.
member.param: The value representing the Record ID as a single string, e.g. "person:john"

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.SurrealDbClient
member.summary: The entry point to communicate with a SurrealDB instance. Authenticate, use namespace/database, execute queries, etc...

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.SurrealDbClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,System.Action{Dahomey.Cbor.CborOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Creates a new SurrealDbClient, with the defined endpoint.
member.param: The endpoint to access a SurrealDB instance.
The naming policy to use for serialization.
An IHttpClientFactory instance, or none.
An optional action to configure .
An instance of used to log messages.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.SurrealDbClient.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions,System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,System.Action{Dahomey.Cbor.CborOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Creates a new SurrealDbClient using a specific configuration.
member.param: The configuration options for the SurrealDbClient.
An IHttpClientFactory instance, or none.
An optional action to configure .
An instance of used to log messages.

member.name: T:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient
member.summary: The entry point to communicate with a SurrealDB instance. Authenticate, use namespace/database, execute queries, etc...

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Uri
member.summary: The uri linked to the SurrealDB instance target.

member.name: P:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.NamingPolicy
member.summary: The naming policy used to serialize and deserialize data (eg. JSON for table name and record field names). Default: PascalCase.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Authenticate(SurrealDb.Net.Models.Auth.Jwt,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates the current connection with a JWT.
member.param: The JWT holder of the token.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Connect(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Connects to the SurrealDB instance. This can improve performance to avoid cold starts.
* Using HTTP(S) protocol: initializes a new HTTP connection
* Using WS(S) protocol: will start a websocket connection so that further calls will be triggered immediately
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Create``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the specific record in the database.
member.remarks: Note: This method creates only a single record. If the record already exist, it will throw an error.
member.typeparam: The type of the record to create.
member.param: The record to create.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Create``1(System.String,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a record in a table in the database.
member.typeparam: The type of the record to create.
member.param: The table name where the record will be stored.
The record to create.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Create``2(SurrealDb.Net.Models.StringRecordId,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the specific record in the database.
member.typeparam: The type of data contained in the record.
The type of the record created.
member.param: The record id.
The data contained in the record.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Delete(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes all records in a table from the database.
member.param: The name of the database table
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Delete(SurrealDb.Net.Models.RecordId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes the specified record from the database.
member.param: The record id.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: Returns true if the record was removed successfully.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Delete(SurrealDb.Net.Models.StringRecordId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes the specified record from the database.
member.param: The record id.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: Returns true if the record was removed successfully.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Health(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks the status of the database server and storage engine.
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: Returns true if the database server and storage engine are healthy.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Info``1(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves information about the authenticated scope user.
member.typeparam: The scope user type.
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: Returns the record of an authenticated scope user.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Insert``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inserts a collection of records in the database.
member.remarks: Note: This method allows you to create multiple records at once. In case a record already exist, it will not throw error and it will not update the existing record.
member.typeparam: The type of the record to create.
member.param: The table name where the records will be stored.
The records to create.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.InsertRelation``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inserts a new relation record in the database.
member.typeparam: The type of the record to create.
member.param: The record data used to create the record.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.InsertRelation``1(System.String,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inserts a new relation record in the database.
member.typeparam: The type of the record to create.
member.param: The table name where the records will be stored.
The record data used to create the record.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Invalidate(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invalidates the authentication for the current connection.
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Kill(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Kills an active live query.
Not supported on HTTP(S) protocol.
member.param: The UUID of the live query to kill.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.ListenLive``1(System.Guid)
member.summary:
Listen for live query responses, using live query UUID.
Not supported on HTTP(S) protocol.
member.typeparam: The type of the data returned by the live query.
member.param: The UUID of the live query to consume.
member.returns: A Live Query instance used to consume data in realtime.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.LiveQuery``1(SurrealDb.Net.Handlers.QueryInterpolatedStringHandler,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Initiates a live query from an interpolated string representing a SurrealQL query.
Not supported on HTTP(S) protocol.
member.typeparam: The type of the data returned by the live query.
member.param: The SurrealQL query.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: A Live Query instance used to consume data in realtime.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.LiveRawQuery``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Initiates a live query from a raw SurrealQL query.
Not supported on HTTP(S) protocol.
member.typeparam: The type of the data returned by the live query.
member.param: The SurrealQL query.
A list of parameters to be used inside the SurrealQL query.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: A Live Query instance used to consume data in realtime.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.LiveTable``1(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Initiates a live query on a table.
Not supported on HTTP(S) protocol.
member.typeparam: The type of the data returned by the live query.
member.param: The name of the database table to watch.
If set to true, live notifications will include an array of JSON Patch objects, rather than the entire record for each notification.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: A Live Query instance used to consume data in realtime.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Merge``2(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Modifies the specified record in the database.
member.typeparam: The type of the merge update.
The type of the record updated.
member.param: The data to merge with the current record.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Merge``1(SurrealDb.Net.Models.RecordId,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Modifies the specified record in the database.
member.typeparam: The type of the record updated.
member.param: The record id.
A list of key-value pairs that contains properties to change.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.typeparam: The type of the record updated.
member.param: The record id.
A list of key-value pairs that contains properties to change.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Modifies all records in the database.
member.typeparam: The type of the merge update.
The type of the record updated.
member.param: The name of the database table.
The data to merge with the current record.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Merge``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)

member.typeparam: The type of the record updated.
member.param: The name of the database table.
A list of key-value pairs that contains properties to change.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Modifies the specified record in the database, using JSON Patch specification (https://jsonpatch.com/).
member.typeparam: The type of the record updated.
member.param: The record id.
A list of JSON Patch operations.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Patch``1(SurrealDb.Net.Models.StringRecordId,SystemTextJsonPatch.JsonPatchDocument{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Modifies the specified record in the database, using JSON Patch specification (https://jsonpatch.com/).
member.typeparam: The type of the record updated.
member.param: The record id.
A list of JSON Patch operations.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Patch``1(System.String,SystemTextJsonPatch.JsonPatchDocument{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Modifies all records in the database, using JSON Patch specification (https://jsonpatch.com/).
member.typeparam: The type of the record updated.
member.param: The name of the database table
A list of JSON Patch operations.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Query(SurrealDb.Net.Handlers.QueryInterpolatedStringHandler,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes SurrealQL queries based on an interpolated string representing a SurrealQL query.
member.param: The SurrealQL query.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: The list of results from the SurrealQL queries.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.RawQuery(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes SurrealQL queries based on a raw SurrealQL query.
member.param: The SurrealQL query.
A list of parameters to be used inside the SurrealQL query.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: The list of results from the SurrealQL queries.

member.summary: Creates a relation between two records.
member.typeparam: The type of the ouput record created.
member.param: The name of the database table.
The record from where the relation starts.
The record to where the relation ends.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

The type of the additional data to add to the relation record.
member.param: The name of the database table.
The record from where the relation starts.
The record to where the relation ends.
Additional data to store in the relation record.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Run``1(System.String,System.Object[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs a SurrealQL function.
member.typeparam: The type of the output of the function called.
member.param: The full name of the function.
The arguments supplied to the function.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: The output of the function called.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Run``1(System.String,System.String,System.Object[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs a versioned SurrealQL function.
member.typeparam: The type of the output of the function called.
member.param: The full name of the function.
The version of the function.
The arguments supplied to the function.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: The output of the function called.

member.summary: Selects all records in a table.
member.typeparam: The type of record to extract
member.param: The name of the database table
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Selects a range of records.

The type of the right/end bound range limit
The type of the record
member.param: The record id range.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Assigns a value as a parameter for this connection.
member.param: The name of the parameter.
The value of the parameter.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Sign in as a root user.
member.param: Credentials to sign in as a root user
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Sign in as a namespace user.
member.param: Credentials to sign in as a namespace user
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Sign in as a database user.
member.param: Credentials to sign in as a database user
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.SignIn``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign in as a scoped user.
member.typeparam: Type of the params used in the SIGNIN scope function
member.param: Credentials to sign in as a scoped user
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: The JSON Web Token that can be used to authenticate the user

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.SignUp``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign up a new scoped user.
member.typeparam: Type of the params used in the SIGNUP scope function
member.param: Credentials to sign up as a scoped user
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: The JSON Web Token that can be used to authenticate the user

member.summary: Removes a parameter from this connection.
member.param: The name of the parameter.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Updates the specified record in the database.

member.param: The record to update.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.param: The record id.
The record to update.

member.param: The name of the database table.
The record to create or update.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.param: The record to create or update.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.typeparam: The type of data contained in the record.

member.param: The record id.
The record to create or update.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.summary: Updates or creates all records in the database.
member.typeparam: The type of the record to upsert.
member.param: The name of the database table.
The record to create or update.
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: The list of created or updated records.

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Use(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Switch to a specific namespace and database.
member.param: Name of the namespace
Name of the database
The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations

member.name: M:SurrealDb.Net.ISurrealDbClient.Version(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve the version of the SurrealDB instance.
member.param: The cancellationToken enables graceful cancellation of asynchronous operations
member.returns: The version of the SurrealDB instance

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to register SurrealDB services. Registers as a singleton instance. Registers for HTTP requests.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSurreal(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime,System.Action{Dahomey.Cbor.CborOptions})
member.summary: Registers SurrealDB services from a ConnectionString.
member.param: Service collection.
Connection string to a SurrealDB instance.
Service lifetime to register services under. Default value is .
An optional action to configure .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSurreal``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime,System.Action{Dahomey.Cbor.CborOptions})
member.summary: Registers SurrealDB services from a ConnectionString.
member.typeparam: Type of to register.
member.param: Service collection.
Connection string to a SurrealDB instance.
Service lifetime to register services under. Default value is .
An optional action to configure .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSurreal(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptionsBuilder},Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime)
member.summary: Registers SurrealDB services with the specified configuration.
member.param: Service collection.
A delegate that is used to configure a .
Service lifetime to register services under. Default value is .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSurreal(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime,System.Action{Dahomey.Cbor.CborOptions})
member.summary: Registers SurrealDB services with the specified configuration.
member.param: Service collection.
Configuration options.
Service lifetime to register services under. Default value is .
An optional action to configure .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSurreal``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime,System.Action{Dahomey.Cbor.CborOptions})
member.summary: Registers SurrealDB services with the specified configuration.
member.typeparam: Type of to register.
member.param: Service collection.
Configuration options.
Service lifetime to register services under. Default value is .
An optional action to configure .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.Endpoint
member.summary:
Endpoint of the SurrealDB instance.
Examples:
- http://127.0.0.1:8000
- wss://cloud.surrealdb.com

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.Namespace
member.summary: Default namespace to use when new is generated.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.Database
member.summary: Default database to use when new is generated.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.Username
member.summary: Default username (Root auth) to use when new is generated.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.Password
member.summary: Default password (Root auth) to use when new is generated.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.Token
member.summary: Default token (User auth) to use when new is generated.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.NamingPolicy
member.summary: Naming policy used to interact with the database. It will change the default NamingPolicy of the used. Valid options are "CamelCase", "SnakeCaseLower", "SnakeCaseUpper", "KebabCaseLower" and "KebabCaseUpper".

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.IsEmbedded
member.summary: Indicates if the options are made to use a SurrealDB instance in embedded mode. Supported embedded modes are mem://.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptions.Logging
member.summary: Logging options used for the SurrealDB client.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptionsBuilder.FromConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Parses the connection string and set the configuration accordingly.
member.param: Connection string to connect to a SurrealDB instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SurrealDbOptionsBuilder.EnableSensitiveDataLogging(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables application data to be included in logs. This typically include parameter values set for SURQL queries, and parameters sent via any client methods. You should only enable this flag if you have the appropriate security measures in place based on the sensitivity of this data.
member.param: If true, then sensitive data is logged.
member.returns: The same builder instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
